channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zinwa solarises rural water supply stations
item.description: TAPIWA CHIRUME ZIMBABWE National Water Authority (Zinwa) has so­larised 78 rural water supply stations to improve ac­cess to clean water. The initiative,... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Su via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Old Mutual migrates to VFEX @ZSE_ZW
item.description: KUDZANAI GEREDE OLD Mutual Zimbabwe (Old Mutual) is set to migrate its secondary listing from the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange (ZSE) to the... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Watchdog slams exclusion of artisanal miners
item.description: SHAMAINE CHIRIMUJIRI ARTISINAL miners have been left out of Zimbabwe’s proposed mining law, sparking warnings from the Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association (Zela).The... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Churches implored to shelter fleeing citizens
item.description: THE Evangelical Fellowship of Zimbabwe (EFZ) has called on churches across the country to open their doors to Zimbabweans returning from South... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
